## [00:00 - 03:05]

Okay, welcome to the Seed Launch Planner. This is a document that we put together for you to really walk through your entire seed launch. And I am a big fan of seed launches. The reason I'm a fan is it allows you to start off with the most minimal list, just a tiny little list, and then use that list to make some sales. And you're making sales before you actually make the product, which is fantastic. Through this process, you create a product, and it's not any product, it's going to be a great product. The reason behind that is because you're using the feedback from your early customers, from your first customers. It's almost like a pilot product. You're using their feedback to help you make a great product. And I tell you this from personal experience, because the first version of Product Launch Formula was developed this way. I initially created this product launch workshop, taught it through a series of teleconferences, and really learned how to teach it, and learned how to create this great product. I had done plenty of launches. I knew how to do launches, but I didn't necessarily know how to teach it. And when I came out with the very first version of Product Launch Formula, way back in 2005, it was a great product. And it wasn't a great product because I'm some genius teacher, or I was just born knowing how to teach product launches. It was because I had this interactive seed launch process that enabled me to learn how to teach product launches. And this hasn't just worked for me. It's worked for a lot of people. And it's something I have gone back to. I just did another seed launch a couple years ago for another product. And this is, and it was a fantastic process, even though I knew my product really well. I knew the topic really well. It was still an amazing process to go through. So this seed launch planner in one document walks you through how to do it. And it starts off at the very beginning with your niche, your niche, your avatar, your product, your offer, building your very, very, very first list. So starting to build your seed list. So if you don't have any list whatsoever, you'll need to get up to 50 people, I would consider minimum. But it'd be better to get to 200 or 300 people. If you're just starting out and that sounds daunting, just follow the steps and follow the steps and launch in your list. It's not that hard to get started. Remember, no one starts with a list. Then you develop your offer. And remember, the offer is always about the transformation. And then you launch. And this is the great thing about a seed launch is the launch is very, very simple. Usually it's one prelaunch video and then one sales video. And we walk you through that in this launch planner. Then you go through your launch, you launch it.

## [03:05 - 04:31]

Give you a lot of information on how to launch it, including scripting this out for you. And then you move on to creating and delivering your product. The key here is it can be super simple. You're basically going to survey your buyers, the people who bought from you. You're going to survey them. You're going to give them the main topics and you're going to survey them for each topic, each main topic within whatever you're teaching. And when you survey them, then they will give you the things you need to talk about, the bullet points, the questions you need to answer. You just organize what questions you're going to answer on each call. And then you just get on the call and you answer the questions. It's super, super simple. It's breathtakingly simple to do this. The technology is pretty darn simple. And so you just deliver your product over a series of calls, three to five calls. I'm a big fan of the number five. And that's it. You're done. You end up with the recordings, the transcripts, and you basically have your product done. So that's the seed launch and that's the seed launch planner. So go go after it. I love the seed launch. It's it's the greatest way to get started. Or if you're already got a great business and you want to create a new product, this is the way to create that product easily.
